CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Hoover Power Plant Act of 1984, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Environmental impact statement
children.label: a Environmental impact statement
children.text: The provisions of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 [ et seq.] shall apply to actions of the Administrator implementing sections 7275 to 7276c of this title in the same manner and to the same extent as such provisions apply to other major Federal actions significantly affecting the quality of the human environment.42 U.S.C. 4321

children.heading: Annual reports
children.label: b Annual reports
children.text: The Administrator shall include in the annual report submitted by the Western Area Power Administration (1) a description of the activities undertaken by the Administrator and by customers under sections 7275 to 7276c of this title and (2) an estimate of the energy savings and renewable resource benefits achieved as a result of such activities.

children.heading: State regulated investor-owned utilities
children.label: c State regulated investor-owned utilities
children.text: Any State regulated electric utility (as defined in ) shall be exempt from the provisions of sections 7275 to 7276c of this title.section 2602(18) of title 16

children.heading: Rural Electrification Administration requirements
children.label: d Rural Electrification Administration requirements
children.text: Nothing in sections 7275 to 7276c of this title shall require a customer to take any action inconsistent with a requirement imposed by the Rural Electrification Administration1So in original. Probably should be followed by a period.1
